column1: Ceddanne Rafaela leads the way with a strong hit probability and a favorable park boost in Colorado, plus a prime spot near the top of the order against a hittable lefty. William Contreras also benefits from the same soft matchup and park conditions, offering steady contact and recent consistency. Yandy Diaz and Brandon Marsh are both in good platoon spots, but Rafaela’s combination of reliability and environment makes him the top choice for Beat The Streak players tonight.
